# Profile Section Updater

Reusable composite GitHub Action for keeping marked README sections fresh.

## Usage

```yaml
- uses: actions/checkout@v4

- name: Update profile section
  uses: ./.github/actions/profile-section-updater
  with:
    script: .github/scripts/updateActivity.js
    commit-message: "⚡ Update Recent Activity"
```

## Built-in scripts

- `updateActivity.js` — recent GitHub events
- `updateTopRepos.js` — top repositories with stars, forks, and language

## README markers

Wrap any auto-updated block with HTML comments:

```md
<!--START_SECTION:activity-->
- content generated by automation
<!--END_SECTION:activity-->
```
